open_transfer.notes: Worker can successfully view pending transfers.

mandatory_proof.implementation: UI blocks validation if no proof file is selected. Upload is handled before edge function call.

validate_transfer_call.notes: Edge function receives correct action 'validate' and proof_url.

status_update.notes: Status correctly updates to 'validated' in database.

wallet_impact.notes: Worker wallet is CREDITED (balance + amount) as they paid cash. Transaction logged.

error_handling.notes: No fetch errors observed. Toast notifications provide clear feedback.

fixes_applied: Refined validate-transfer edge function to strictly CREDIT worker wallet
Updated TransferDetail.jsx to enforce proof upload with visual feedback
Added upsert: true to proof upload to prevent filename collisions
